generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people support strategic autonomy, but let's be real - we're just shifting the burden to our allies. Our defense industry can't handle this alone, and we'll end up relying on others even more. Common sense says we should focus on what actually keeps us safe, not some idealistic vision that puts us at risk. #NationalSecurityFirst
